headline: Will NextEra Gain by Generating Power From Multiple Clean Sources?
summary: NEE's clean energy push, renewables backlog, stable cash flows and stronger ROE position it to benefit from rising low-carbon power demand.

raw.headline: Will NextEra Gain by Generating Power From Multiple Clean Sources?

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Southern, Lowers Price Target to $98
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Southern (NYSE:SO) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $99 to $98.
